{{Quote|Rather than sniff out conspiracy in every corner, I think this is just a political save-face maneuver. After the embarrassment of last week's plea to Dooku, I think Palpatine's finally getting some real direction by turning to those more proactive than he.|Senator Tashrikam|<ref name="HoloNet" />}}
'''Tashrikam''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented<ref name="HoloNet" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Grizmallt/Legends|Grizmallt]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].<ref name="HoloNet" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #49]] was published on 13:3:28, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] announced the formation of the [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]], a group of [[Politics/Legends|politicians]] united to diplomatically address the growing [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].<ref name="HoloNet" />

In a statement recorded in the 13:3:28 issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]], Tashrikam considered the committee's creation a maneuver made by the chancellor to save face rather than a chance to hunt conspiracies. Tashrikam compared the committee's formation to the chancellor's [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] plea made in the previous [[Standard week/Legends|week]] for negotiations with Separatist [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], praising Palpatine's new direction in turning to proactive members of the senate for assistance.<ref name="HoloNet" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tashikram was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #49'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]],<ref name="HoloNet" /> which was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[March 29]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN49 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6217551|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Dev Sibwarra|date=2002-03-29|time=11:24 AM|archivedate=20211010041804}}</ref>
